scripts.check:engineering: npm run test:evidence && npm run verify:inputs && npm run generate && npm run verify:generated
scripts.check:engineering:full: npm run check:engineering && npm run test:e2e && npm run verify:engineering-readiness
scripts.check:release: npm run check:engineering && npm run verify:golden-release && npm run verify:release-rights
scripts.check: npm run import:liwengtang && npm run verify:sources && npm run check:engineering && npm run status
scripts.generate: npm run generate:data && npm run generate:site
scripts.generate:data: npm run generate:variants && npm run generate:golden-candidates && npm run generate:collation-preflight && npm run generate:formula-safety && npm run generate:formula-variants && npm run generate:quality
scripts.generate:site: npm run generate:report && npm run generate:formula-report && npm run generate:edition-catalog-report
scripts.verify:inputs: npm run verify:import && npm run verify:integrity && npm run verify:edition-catalog && npm run verify:expert-pool
scripts.verify:generated: npm run validate:schemas && npm run verify:artifacts && npm run verify:quality-gates
